title: RHmagic
description: This is the magic member of the RH modpack family.
body:
## Welcome to RHmagic
A magical Minecraft modpack that brings a new adventures and magic experiences. We've put together this modpack with a careful selection of magical mods that allow players to explore a world of advanced alchemy and wizardery.

And that's not all! **RHmagic** also offers its own dedicated server for players who want to connect and share their adventures with others. Together you can build, innovate and compete in a world full of magical challenges. We also have a community Discord server where you can connect with other players, get tips and advice, and become part of our growing Minecraft community.

Get ready for an adventure where you'll build, create and discover to reach the pinnacle of magical skills in Minecraft. **RHmagic** is for those who seek challenges and want to dive into the world of advanced magic and alchemy - join and start your journey to magical supremacy.




**[Disocrd Server](https://discord.gg/TfPFT5F8ex) - _Check the modpack's Discord for a great community server ;-)_**

<details>
<summary>More information</summary>

- Modpack is build on Forge for Minecraft version 1.16.5  
- _Minimum RAM_ : **6GB**  
- _Recomended RAM_ : **8GB**  
- Any problems, bugs or questions report to our discord server.  

</details>
